question.text: Which of the following is NOT typically part of an illustrative DD questionnaire for an AIF?

answer.text: Fund's legal structure and regulatory registration status
The fund manager's personal astrological chart and horoscope
Key person details and investment team background

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Standard DD questionnaires cover legal structure, regulatory status, key persons, investment process, valuation methodology, reporting, and risk management. Personal astrological details have no place in professional DD. **The Trap:** All other options are standard components of a comprehensive AIF DD questionnaire as recommended by industry best practices. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series XIX-A provides an illustrative DD questionnaire covering all standard professional areas. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Use a standardized DD questionnaire template and send it to the fund before the DD meeting — this allows the fund to prepare detailed responses and makes the meeting more productive.
